import React , {useState} from 'react'; import {AiOutlineEyeInvisible , AiOutlineEye} from "react-icons/ai"; function SignupForm() { const [formData , setFormData] = useState({ firstName : "" , lastName : "" , email : "" , password : "" , confirmPassword : "" , }) const [showPassword , setShowPassword] = useState(false); function changeHandler(event) { setFormData(prevData => ( { ...prevData , [event.target.name] : event.target.value } )) } return (
) } export default SignupForm
